item.name: Grani Horn
item.description: A stygian horn that, when blown, summons the otherworldly steed Grani.

mount.name: Grani
mount.action: Summon Grani, heroic steed from a realm not your own.
mount.description: Possessed of a strength of both mind and body that is unmatched in the First, as a mount, Grani has no peer on land nor in the heavens. It is said, however, the noble creature will only accept a rider who has pledged to restore shadow to a land bereft of night.
mount.tooltip:
The lives of my men may depend
upon the swiftness of your steed...
- Topher
